mapper.sql: code, day, name, open, high, low, `close`, prev_close, percent, volume, amount, turnover_rate, ma5, ma10, ma20, ma30, ma60, ma120, dea, dif, macd, cross_params
mapper.select: select * from dayk where code = #{code} and day = #{day}
mapper.delete: delete from dayk where code = #{code} and day = #{day}
mapper.select:
select max(day) from dayk where code = 'sh600000'
and day < #{fromDay}

select
from dayk s
and s.code in
#{item}
